entries.scope: historical apps/glue-python default cleaning execution compatibility path
entries.reason: Default cleaning mode previously kept a Python legacy fallback when Rust v2 execution was unavailable or shadow compare mismatched.
entries.success_metric: default cleaning mode stays on Rust v2 or fails closed; Python legacy fallback is only reachable through explicit opt-in recovery controls
entries.kill_condition: default cleaning mode no longer depends on Python legacy fallback for normal release traffic and legacy fallback survives only as an explicit opt-in exception path

entries.scope: historical workflow import and normalization compatibility path
entries.reason: Historical workflow payloads previously included unversioned graph samples that required migration into versioned workflow_definition inputs.
entries.success_metric: new saves, versions, templates, and runs persist workflow_definition with explicit version; unversioned workflow inputs fail closed on the main path
entries.kill_condition: unversioned workflow imports are rejected on the main path and legacy conversion only remains available through the dev-only offline migration script

entries.scope: historical desktop base_api recovery compatibility path
entries.reason: Desktop previously supported an automatic local recovery path when base_api execution failed and offline cleaning remained available.
entries.success_metric: base_api execution defaults to explicit retry or fail-closed behavior without automatic mode mutation; historical recovery remains explicit operator choice only
entries.kill_condition: automatic offline_fallback mode is removed from the default desktop path and retained at most as an explicit historical recovery script
